comment: Phase 2 allowed Java-vs-Go divergences against the multi-lang fixture. Entries are tags interpreted by parity.diffJSON; the strings here document intent. Reserved tags: 'java_resolved_to_syntactic' (Java RESOLVED-tier edges drop to SYNTACTIC because the Go side does not yet bootstrap a full symbol resolver), 'lex_comment_whitespace' (Java + Go both do trim+single-space — no daylight expected today, slot reserved for CI catches).
